The '''QV-3 Disruptor''' was an energy weapon produced by [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] for use in [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
